requirement_topic.en: Noise Handling and the Absence of EU-Style Outdoor-Noise Marking
requirement_topic.zh: 噪声处理与无欧盟式户外噪声标识
requirement_topic.zht: 噪聲處理與無歐盟式戶外噪聲標識

summary.en: Chile does not operate an EU-style horizontal outdoor-noise marking regime equivalent to Directive 2000/14/EC for power tools placed on the market. There is no national requirement for a guaranteed sound-power-level marking or LWA label on the tool as a market-access condition. Noise in Chile is treated mainly through environmental and occupational frameworks, such as workplace noise-exposure limits enforced by health and labour authorities, rather than a product-level outdoor-noise marking. Exporters should not claim a Chilean outdoor-noise marking, because none exists.
summary.zh: 智利没有像欧盟指令 2000/14/EC 那样、针对投放市场电动工具的横向户外噪声标识制度。没有把保证声功率级标识或 LWA 标签作为市场准入条件的国家要求。智利的噪声主要通过环境和职业框架处理，例如由卫生和劳工主管部门执行的工作场所噪声暴露限值，而非产品级户外噪声标识。出口商不应声称存在智利户外噪声标识，因为并不存在。
summary.zht: 智利沒有像歐盟指令 2000/14/EC 那樣、針對投放市場電動工具的橫向戶外噪聲標識制度。沒有把保證聲功率級標識或 LWA 標籤作為市場准入條件的國家要求。智利的噪聲主要通過環境和職業框架處理，例如由衛生和勞工主管部門執行的工作場所噪聲暴露限值，而非產品級戶外噪聲標識。出口商不應聲稱存在智利戶外噪聲標識，因為並不存在。

standards_or_laws: No Chilean equivalent to EU Directive 2000/14/EC outdoor-noise marking for power tools at market-access level
Chilean occupational and environmental noise rules (workplace noise-exposure limits, environmental noise norms) as the relevant context rather than product marking

summary.en: China GB/T 3883 safety evidence focuses on electrical and mechanical hazards and may report a declared noise value, but it does not constitute a Chilean outdoor-noise marking. China likewise has no obligation equivalent to a SEC-mandated outdoor-noise product label; noise is mostly handled through occupational exposure and environmental standards.
summary.zh: 中国 GB/T 3883 安全证据侧重电气和机械危险，可能报告声明噪声值，但不构成智利户外噪声标识。中国同样没有与 SEC 强制户外噪声产品标签对应的义务；噪声主要通过职业暴露和环境标准处理。
summary.zht: 中國 GB/T 3883 安全證據側重電氣和機械危險，可能報告聲明噪聲值，但不構成智利戶外噪聲標識。中國同樣沒有與 SEC 強制戶外噪聲產品標籤對應的義務；噪聲主要通過職業暴露和環境標準處理。

standards_or_laws: China occupational and environmental noise standards where applicable

gap.en: There is no Chilean product-level outdoor-noise marking to comply with, so the honest position is that this EU-style requirement does not transfer. The practical action is not to fabricate a Chilean noise mark, to keep any declared noise value consistent with the GB/T file, and to verify workplace and environmental noise rules separately if the tool is used in regulated worksites.
gap.zh: 智利没有需要符合的产品级户外噪声标识，因此诚实的结论是这一欧盟式要求不适用。务实做法是不要编造智利噪声标志，使任何声明噪声值与 GB/T 文件一致，并在工具用于受监管工地时单独核验工作场所和环境噪声规定。
gap.zht: 智利沒有需要符合的產品級戶外噪聲標識，因此誠實的結論是這一歐盟式要求不適用。務實做法是不要編造智利噪聲標誌，使任何聲明噪聲值與 GB/T 文件一致，並在工具用於受監管工地時單獨核驗工作場所和環境噪聲規定。

target.en: Not applicable as a product market-access marking: Chile has no EU-style outdoor-noise marking obligation for power tools. Occupational and environmental noise rules may apply to the use of the tool but are not a product-level certification mark.
target.zh: 作为产品市场准入标识不适用：智利对电动工具没有欧盟式户外噪声标识义务。职业和环境噪声规定可能适用于工具的使用，但不是产品级认证标志。
target.zht: 作為產品市場准入標識不適用：智利對電動工具沒有歐盟式戶外噪聲標識義務。職業和環境噪聲規定可能適用於工具的使用，但不是產品級認證標誌。

cn.en: China has no product-level outdoor-noise marking equivalent either; noise is handled through occupational and environmental standards.
cn.zh: 中国同样没有产品级户外噪声标识对应要求；噪声通过职业和环境标准处理。
cn.zht: 中國同樣沒有產品級戶外噪聲標識對應要求；噪聲通過職業和環境標準處理。

source.publisher: Superintendencia de Electricidad y Combustibles (SEC), Chile

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No Chilean outdoor-noise product marking applies, so there is nothing to certify at market-access level. Do not claim a Chilean noise mark; keep declared noise values consistent with the source file and check occupational or environmental noise rules separately for use contexts.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 智利没有适用的户外噪声产品标识，因此在市场准入层面无需认证。不要声称存在智利噪声标志；使声明噪声值与来源文件一致，并针对使用场景单独核查职业或环境噪声规定。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 智利沒有適用的戶外噪聲產品標識，因此在市場准入層面無需認證。不要聲稱存在智利噪聲標誌；使聲明噪聲值與來源文件一致，並針對使用場景單獨核查職業或環境噪聲規定。
